changelog:
### 🚀 Debt & Schedule Enhancements
- **Same Amount Toggle** — Added a segmented control to switch between 'Same Amount' and 'Custom per Month' when creating or editing debts. Choosing 'Same Amount' allows typing the amount once to auto-populate all unpaid schedules.
- **Extended Installment Milestones** — Raised the maximum installment cap from 12 to 360 to support long-term debts (e.g. mortgages), and added a direct text input field to easily enter large installment values.
- **Future Date Support** — Extended the schedule date picker range up to 35 years into the future.

### 🚀 Offline & Sync Infrastructure
- **Fail-Safe Offline Queue** — Implemented an offline pending operations queue in Isar. Writes and deletes to Firestore that fail due to connection drops are automatically queued and processed in FIFO order once internet access returns.
- **Actual Reachability Monitoring** — Added a ConnectivityService using network HEAD requests to check actual internet reachability instead of just local interface network availability.
- **Resume Sync Checks** — Enforced auto-sync checking when the app transitions from background to foreground.

### 🔧 UX & Interface Polish
- **Non-Intrusive Sync Status Indicator** — Integrated a subtle cloud status badge in the home screen app bar. It appears only when the app is offline or has pending sync items, showing the count of queued changes without interrupting normal operations.
